description: Before every flight, a pilot must perform a walk-around inspection of the aircraft to check for any obvious issues.

nodes.task_description: Follow a standard checklist to visually inspect the aircraft's exterior.

expected_outcome.value: Pilot follows the prescribed flow around the aircraft.

nodes.task_description: Check for issues such as tire condition, leaks, damage to control surfaces, and that all sensor covers have been removed.

expected_outcome.value: Pilot carefully inspects all key areas.

nodes.task_description: If any issues are found, report them to maintenance. If not, sign off on the inspection in the aircraft's technical log.

expected_outcome.value: No issues are found. Pilot signs the log, confirming the aircraft is fit to fly.
